trajectory_summary: This call never connected to a live customer. The transcript is entirely a voicemail system prompt — five lines of automated audio, no rep speech, no customer voice, no interaction. There is no trajectory to assess, no energy built or leaked, and no outcome to dispute beyond noting the call should not be in the analysis queue as a setter interaction.
outcome_dispute: The v1 outcome tag is listed as 'unknown,' which is accurate in the narrow sense but understates the situation. This is not an unknown outcome — it is a voicemail non-connect. It should be tagged 'no_contact_voicemail' and routed to callback queue, not to trajectory analysis. Any outcome tag implying a setter interaction occurred would be a miscall.

primary_coaching_focus.quote: Please leave your message for John Livingston.
primary_coaching_focus.why: This call produced no transcript content to coach on — the rep reached voicemail and no message or follow-up action is captured. The coaching priority is not rep technique but floor-level protocol: Ion's codex has no defined voicemail handling procedure (it is a TBD gap). The manager should use this call as the prompt to establish one — what the rep says on voicemail, what CRM action follows, and how the lead is re-queued. Without that protocol, every no-answer call is an untracked dead end.

key_moments.quote: Please leave your message for John Livingston.
key_moments.stewart_read: The call reached voicemail. No live interaction occurred. There is no rep behavior to evaluate — strategic or reactive. The only observable fact is that the rep either hung up without leaving a message or the recording captured nothing after the tone.

The customer's name is confirmed as John Livingston from the voicemail greeting. This is the only qualifying data point the transcript yields. No bill, no address, no title, no interest signal — nothing from the verify section was captured.

The voicemail system confirms no message was left. This is a dead-end touch with no follow-up artifact — no voicemail, no text, no CRM note visible in the transcript. The lead is effectively in limbo unless the rep took action outside this recording.

key_moments.quote: Simply hang up when done. Or for delivery options, press the pound sign.
key_moments.stewart_read: The transcript ends at the voicemail system's closing prompt. No rep action is captured. This call yields zero coaching signal on setter technique — it is a routing and protocol gap, not a performance gap.
